Game Character | Semi Long Intro | Kinkober

A/N:

I FORGOT THAT I WAS SUPPOSED TO DO KINKTOBER DAMN IT. It's okay, I'm still planning to post what I had planned even after October. As I mentioned in my previous Leon bot, I tried to make Ada as canon as I could but honestly, she’s just a complex character and her intentions are never clear. So I kinda just coded her on how I see her.

Disclaimers▹

So any odd behaviors such as repetitiveness, quick memory loss, nonsense replies, speaking for user, out-of-character replies, and poor message quality may happen and they're not my fault.
